instruction: Create an LWC component that displays a paginated list of Accounts fetched from an Apex controller, with next and previous buttons.
output: // accountList.js import { LightningElement, track } from 'lwc'; import getAccounts from '@salesforce/apex/AccountController.getAccounts'; const PAGE_SIZE = 10; export default class AccountList extends LightningElement { @track accounts = []; @track error; @track currentPage = 1; @track totalPages = 1; connectedCallback() { this.loadAccounts(); } loadAccounts() { getAccounts({ pageNumber: this.currentPage, pageSize: PAGE_SIZE }) .then(result => { this.accounts = result.records; this.totalPages = Math.ceil(result.totalCount / PAGE_SIZE); this.error = undefined; }) .catch(error => { this.error = error.body.message; this.accounts = []; }); } handleNext() { if (this.currentPage < this.totalPages) { this.currentPage++; this.loadAccounts(); } } handlePrevious() { if (this.currentPage > 1) { this.currentPage--; this.loadAccounts(); } } get isPreviousDisabled() { return this.currentPage <= 1; } get isNextDisabled() { return this.currentPage >= this.totalPages; } }

instruction: Create an LWC component that shows a success or error toast notification after a user submits a form to create a new Contact.
output: // newContactForm.js import { LightningElement, track } from 'lwc'; import { ShowToastEvent } from 'lightning/platformShowToastEvent'; import createContact from '@salesforce/apex/ContactController.createContact'; export default class NewContactForm extends LightningElement { @track firstName = ''; @track lastName = ''; @track email = ''; handleFirstName(e) { this.firstName = e.detail.value; } handleLastName(e) { this.lastName = e.detail.value; } handleEmail(e) { this.email = e.detail.value; } handleSave() { if (!this.lastName) { this.showToast('Error', 'Last Name is required.', 'error'); return; } createContact({ firstName: this.firstName, lastName: this.lastName, email: this.email }) .then(() => { this.showToast('Success', 'Contact created successfully!', 'success'); this.firstName = ''; this.lastName = ''; this.email = ''; }) .catch(error => { this.showToast('Error', error.body.message, 'error'); }); } showToast(title, message, variant) { this.dispatchEvent(new ShowToastEvent({ title, message, variant })); } }
